summary: Review Generator connection pipeline end-to-end for completeness, edge cases, and improvement points

details.user_request: 최근 구축한 Generator 연결 작업과 관련 세부 파이프라인이 전체적으로 완벽한지 A-Z로 검토하고 평가 및 개선점을 알려달라는 요청.

exclude: Implementing code changes unless separately requested
Running real Claude CLI generation that may incur external execution side effects

success_criteria: Trace the Generator pipeline from task creation to handoff, execution, artifact capture, validation boundary, retry/failure handling, and reporting.
Identify concrete gaps, edge cases, and operational risks with file references.
Separate current blockers from future enhancements.
Provide an overall readiness assessment and prioritized improvement plan.
details.branch_omission_reason: Review-only task with no production or harness file edits planned beyond required task ledger creation.

next_action: Inspect relevant scripts, schemas, guides, reports, and audit commands.

summary: Completed end-to-end Generator pipeline review and safe dry-run validation

details.readiness_assessment: Generator execution and ledger capture are usable, but the full A-Z pipeline is not complete because Validator invocation, retry handoff generation, branch enforcement, output path hardening, and result schema validation are not automated.
strengths: Fresh Claude CLI invocation is enforced by wrapper command shape.
Forbidden resume/continue flags and bypassPermissions default are blocked.
Handoff JSON checks task_id, agent, fresh-session flags, spec existence, ledger task path, and root path escape.
Artifacts and ledger events are written for real Generator runs.
Failure Handling docs correctly distinguish policy from current automation scope.

findings.description: Wrapper does not verify the current branch is task/{TASK-ID} before allowing Edit/Write tools. Git policy requires Generator work on task branches, but the wrapper only documents this as a checklist.
Default allowed tools permit broad Edit/Write without constraining changes to allowed_context.target_files. Scope violations are caught only by manual post-run diff review.
expected_output_path is only constrained to stay inside the repository root. A malformed handoff can cause stdout to overwrite an arbitrary repository file.
Markdown handoff inputs bypass the structured JSON handoff checks, weakening the context minimization and refs validation boundary.
Exit status 0 is recorded as PENDING_VALIDATION without parsing generator-result.json or checking the declared expected output schema.
Validator-A/B execution, errors[] to retry handoff conversion, repeated-error detection, Conflict Report, and Adjudication remain manual.
Schema uses plain strings for refs and expected_output_path instead of path patterns that constrain them to task-scoped directories.

next_action: Report readiness and prioritized improvements to user.

summary: Completed review-only assessment of Generator connection pipeline

details.branch_omission_reason: Review-only assessment with no production or harness behavior edits; only task ledger, task spec, and session log records were created.
details.merge_omission_reason: No implementation branch or merge needed for Tier1 review-only assessment.
details.quality_score_skipped_reason: Tier1 review-only assessment; no implementation or official report requested.
details.git_dirty_allowed_reason: Completion record, task spec, and session log are being committed and pushed as this review task's operating records.

next_action: User can choose whether to implement prioritized hardening items in a follow-up Task.
